articles.title: Kimi: Threat or menace?
articles.description: Chinese company Moonshot AI released a new version of its Kimi model this week, prompting concern about "full AI communism."

articles.title: Crypto executives say digital native generations may never need a bank account
articles.description: teakhouse Financial co-founder Adrian Cachinero says digital-native generations may rely less on banks, while Binance says younger users are already driving crypto adoption in emerging markets.

articles.title: DOG Mode explains Bitcoin's next governance fight
articles.description: Leonidas' DOG Mode client challenges Bitcoin's default relay policies, reopening a philosophical debate over censorship, free markets and who really governs the network.

articles.title: All the EVs that were discontinued or killed off in the U.S. this year
articles.description: Th Honda Prologue will no longer be sold in the U.S., joining a growing list of EV models to exit the market this year.

articles.title: Trump targets Brazil's payments system while dollar stablecoins are quietly overtaking country's payments
articles.description: Washington views Brazil’s promotion of non-dollar payment channels, including Pix and the growth of stablecoins, as a potential threat to dollar-based trade, even as dollar-linked stablecoins account for about 90% of Brazil's crypto transactions.

articles.title: Federal employees can download TikTok on their work phones again
articles.description: The Department of Justice says that federal employees can now download TikTok on their government devices.

articles.title: Here is why a massive $1.6 billion in crypto liquidity is sitting idle and wasting away
articles.description: About $542 million weekly sat outside active trading ranges, meaning this capital earned zero fees and provided no market depth.

articles.title: Massive bitcoin call spreads target $72,000 by month end, right when the Fed meets
articles.description: Large traders are betting on a BTC price rise to $72,000 by the end of the month, latest options market flow suggests.

articles.title: Tokenization has become a strategic priority for 84% of financial firms
articles.description: A Broadridge survey found Wall Street is accelerating tokenization efforts while betting on hybrid markets where digital and traditional assets coexist.

articles.title: Here’s what happened in crypto today
articles.description: Need to know what happened in crypto today? Here is the latest news on daily trends and events impacting Bitcoin price, blockchain, DeFi, Web3 and crypto regulation.

articles.title: Kaspersky identifies malware framework targeting crypto investors
articles.description: Cybersecurity company Kaspersky said a newly identified malware framework is targeting cryptocurrency investors through social engineering tactics and trojanized GitHub apps.

articles.title: French gambling regulator orders ISPs to block Polymarket
articles.description: France’s gambling authority has ordered the country’s internet service providers to geoblock Polymarket, citing illegal gambling and market manipulation concerns.
